TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract sealed beforefieldinit MsalMetricsCatalog extends System.Object

Docs.summary: Describes the OpenTelemetry metrics that MSAL emits and, for each metric, the canonical (MSAL-owned) tag names it records. Consumers such as downstream metric pipelines can use to discover which tags belong to a given MSAL metric and, for example, keep only those tags.

remarks.para: The tag names listed for a metric are the canonical base tags MSAL emits for it (some are conditional). They do not include any extra tags supplied through , which are caller-defined and therefore not part of this catalog. Some canonical tags are emitted only under certain conditions (for example the raw STS error-code tag is present on the failure counter only when the STS returns a sub-error); they are listed here because they are part of the metric's canonical schema.

Both the metric names (the dictionary keys) and the tag names (the dictionary values) are plain strings that match what MSAL records, so consumers can compare them directly against the metric and tag names observed on the OpenTelemetry pipeline, then drive per-metric tag filtering from this mapping (for example via OpenTelemetry Views and MetricStreamConfiguration.TagKeys). Keeping the mapping here means it stays in sync with MSAL automatically: updating the MSAL package reference updates the canonical tag set, with nothing to maintain on the consumer side.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Shared ReadOnly Property CanonicalTagsByMetric As IReadOnlyDictionary(Of String, IReadOnlyList(Of String))

Docs.summary: Maps each MSAL metric name to the read-only list of canonical tag names that metric records. Keys are compared with .
